title: Korea Western Power Signs Deal with Linde Korea to Expand Clean Hydrogen and Carbon Capture Tech
content: Korea Western Power is teaming up with industrial gas giant Linde Korea to scale up clean hydrogen power generation and carbon capture and storage (CCS) technologies across South Korea. The agreement, signed in Venecia, Seosan, aims to support the governmentâ€™s 2050 net-zero roadmap by enhancing domestic capabilities in hydrogen production, liquefaction, storage, and COâ‚‚ management. â€œWe will strengthen our clean hydrogen power generation capabilities through CCS technology in cooperation with world-renowned hydrogen companies,â€ said Lee Jung-bok, president of Western Power.
author: Analysts Account
